narrative:
Precinct Brunswick City 2-E (precinct in Medina County) has 739 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
